👥 2v2 TEAM BATTLE — SETUP
OPPONENTS
Online 2v2 (first build): you host as A1 and invite a friend to play A2 on your team vs two AI. Set your team health and your own deck below, then hit Invite a Friend — they'll get a popup to accept. (Friends are managed in the Friends menu.)

⚡ ADMIN PANEL
RESTRICTED
⚙ SYSTEM TOGGLES
⚠ GLOBAL: These toggles affect ALL players. You as admin always have access.
🏪 Shop System GLOBAL
Allow ALL players to access the shop (you always see it)
🎉 Events Tab GLOBAL
Show seasonal events tab in shop
🏅 Achievements GLOBAL
Enable achievement tracking for everyone
⚔ Battle Pass GLOBAL
Show Battle Pass on menu for everyone (you always see it)
🎴 Admin Card Override ADMIN ONLY
YOU always have 4 copies of every card (does not affect others)
⚡ QUICK ACTIONS
✨ Holo Preview Mode ADMIN ONLY
Controls when you see the holo style picker / effect in card previews
⚔ BATTLE PASS EDITOR
Configure season name, start date, duration, XP rates, costs, and tier rewards.
🗺️ CAMPAIGN EDITOR
Edit chapter names, match names, opponent portraits, and rewards. Changes save globally and apply to all players.
ℹ INFO
User ID: —
Username: —
GLOBAL toggles affect every player on the platform.
ADMIN ONLY toggles affect only your own session.
✓ You as admin always have full access regardless of toggle state.

🔄 TRADE
Trade specific card versions with a friend. One of you creates a trade and shares the code; the other joins it. Both pick what to offer, both lock in, both confirm — then the cards swap.

🎁 TIER REWARDS
For each tier you can set a Free/Standard/Premium reward. Type can be: celestium, pack, card, or cosmetic. Leave a track blank to skip it.
